faq.question: What is the application deadline for Canada Export Development Grants  | + International Market Expansion Across 18+ Programs in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Canada Export Development Grants  | + International Market Expansion Across 18+ Programs?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $680M.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Digital Marketing Eligibility
expertTip.content: CanExport now covers exclusively digital activities like SEO and online advertising for foreign markets. You don't even need to travel to qualify.
